faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Kew Gardens?

faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize humane bee removal whenever possible, working with local beekeepers to relocate colonies rather than exterminate them. Our methods protect the important role bees play in our ecosystem while ensuring your Kew Gardens property is safe.

faqs.answer: We remove all bee species common to Kew Gardens including honey bees, carpenter bees, bumblebees, and ground bees.
